name: MindsDB
description: Open-source federated data engine that lets users query 200+ data sources in SQL and natural language, building self-reasoning AI agents as AI-Tables.

seo.title: MindsDB — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: MindsDB: Open-source federated data engine that lets users query 200+ data sources in SQL and natural language, building self-reasoning AI agents as AI-Tables.

when_to_use: Running ML predictions as SQL queries against existing databases
Connecting LLMs directly to databases for AI-powered queries
Building real-time AI features without a separate ML pipeline
Fine-tuning and deploying models via SQL syntax on any data source

pros: Query 200+ data sources with SQL and natural language
cons: Abstraction can hide query performance issues
Feature surface is broad and sometimes thin
Enterprise support tier needed for scale
review.verdict: Powerful glue layer for data-grounded AI if you accept the leaky SQL-on-everything abstraction.
review.best_for: Analysts and engineers building AI agents over many heterogeneous data sources
review.not_for: Teams needing hand-tuned performance on a single warehouse

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
